reasoning: The control CCCS SI-2: Flaw Remediation focuses on the identification and remediation of software flaws, which can be mapped to Kubernetes through mechanisms such as admission controllers for image vulnerability scanning and patch management policies. Additionally, audit logging can be used to track changes to network policies, and ensuring the API server is automatically upgraded aligns with automatic upgrades in cloud environments.
title: CCCS SI-2: Flaw Remediation
